TARG_CRITERIA_MET_DT 
LABEL: 
Date Part D Targeting Criteria Met 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date of the beneficiary met the specified targeting criteria for Medication Therapy 
Management (MTM) per CMS's Part D requirements
